name: @sendero/insurance
description: Sendero — travel insurance provisioning. PARKED — code preserved, NOT wired into the runtime today. Reactivate by (1) re-adding `searchInsuranceTool` + `bookInsuranceTool` to packages/tools/src/index.ts, (2) applying migrations/20260504200000_insurance_booking_kind, (3) populating FAYE_API_KEY env. Provider-agnostic interface (Faye primary stub). Same resale model as eSIM: Sendero owns the partner contract, tenants resell with their own markup via TenantPricingPolicy.markupConfig.insurance.
